import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Footer.css'; function Footer() { return (
✦ ModelVogue

India's premier modeling event platform. Discover, attend, and experience the world of fashion.

📸 📘 🐦 ▶️

Quick Links

  • Home
  • All Events
  • Our Models
  • Contact Us

Event Types

  • Runway Shows
  • Bridal Showcases
  • Gala Nights
  • Street Style Fests

Contact

  • 📍 Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
  • 📞 +91 98765 43210
  • ✉️ bookings@modelvogue.com
  • ⏰ Mon–Sat, 10AM–7PM

© {new Date().getFullYear()} ModelVogue. All rights reserved. | Built as a POC Demo

); } export default Footer;
